name: codex-stats
description: Local usage analytics and a heatmap for Codex CLI session logs.

interface.shortDescription: Render a local usage dashboard from ~/.codex session logs
interface.longDescription: Codex Stats is a local-first MVP plugin that reads Codex session logs from ~/.codex, aggregates per-day token activity, and renders a GitHub-style heatmap with streak and model summary stats.
defaultPrompt: Show my local Codex usage heatmap.
Summarize my Codex activity for the last 30 days.
Which model do I use most in Codex?
